root.content: Phase 7: Code-Intel Surgeon Engine - Validate PRD & Execution Plan, research FastCode patterns, synthesize into actionable plan

children.content: Phase 7 Planning: 3-stream parallel research - (1) Codebase current state scan, (2) FastCode repo deep research, (3) PRD validation against live code
Research HKUDS/FastCode repo: extract tree-sitter patterns, code-intel architecture, agent tools design for Phase 7 Code-Intel Surgeon Engine
3 research streams complete. Synthesizing findings: PRD 6/8 claims TRUE, FastCode 14 patterns extracted, 15 files inventoried. Moving to synthesis and plan improvement.
Synthesis phase: verifying current codebase health (npm test + tsc) before finalizing plan, then producing improved execution plan document
Baseline GREEN: 194 tests pass, 0 tsc errors. Now producing improved execution plan incorporating all 3 research streams.
Producing improved PRD v1.1 and Execution Plan v1.1 incorporating: PRD verification corrections, FastCode patterns, downstream impact analysis
Writing improved PRD v1.1 and Execution Plan v1.1 with research-validated corrections and FastCode pattern integration
Phase 7 Execution: Layer 1 Foundation Fixes. Baseline GREEN (194 pass, 0 tsc). Installing packages then delegating 7A.1-7A.7 tasks.
Installing prerequisite packages (magic-string, ignore, remark, unist-util-visit) then delegating Layer 1 tasks to hivemaker agents
Implementing Task 7A.1-7A.3 byte-offset propagation in tree-sitter loader, Signature schema, and signature extractor with verification
Reviewing Task 7A.1-7A.3 byte-offset propagation implementation (review-only, no edits)
Research and plan OpenTUI dashboard UX/UI specification for OpenCode SDK integration
Research UX/UI specifications and OpenTUI capabilities to draft the prototype plan for Hivemind's OpenCode sidecar dashboard
Completed review of Task 7A.1-7A.3 byte-offset propagation implementation; verdict APPROVED with evidence
7A.1-7A.3 + 7A.6 complete. Baseline GREEN (194/0). Now delegating 7A.4 (incremental-updater) + 7A.5 (watch-integration) sequential chain.
UX/UI OpenTUI Dashboard Specification Prototype using HiveFiver MCP Research Loop
Auto-realign: Running HiveFiver MCP Research Loop to gather UX/UI patterns, OpenTUI integrations, and OpenCode SDK capabilities for the dashboard specification.
Implementing Task 7A.4 + 7A.5 in incremental-updater.ts and watch-integration.ts with optional CompressedCodemap wiring
Reading OpenTUI React reconciler layout patterns and OpenCode SDK event subscription to synthesize PRD structure
Synthesizing Research Insights into OpenTUI Dashboard PRD & Execution Plan
External code review of Task 7A.4 + 7A.5 in incremental-updater.ts and watch-integration.ts; verify optional params, signatureDelta, compressed stats recalculation, and updater call propagation
UX/UI OpenTUI Dashboard PRD finalized and committed. Moving forward to implementation mapping.
Auto-realign: Running HiveFiver governance checkpoint and saving critical memory for OpenTUI Dashboard UX/UI specification.
Completed Task 7A.4 + 7A.5 implementation and verification (tsc/tests + external hivehealer review approved)
